holdings.n: First American Government Obligations Fund Class X

holdings.infoBox: FFOX is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 5.80%, Halozyme Therapeutics at 3.02%, Guardant Health at 2.84%, Mercury Systems at 2.24%, and Carpenter Technology at 2.15%.

overview.description: The fundX Future Fund Opportunities ETF (FFOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks to provide capital appreciation through an actively managed portfolio of small- and mid-cap  companies from around the world. The funds investments focus on long-term megatrends believed to be best positioned for outperformance. FFOX was launched on Jun 10, 2025 and is issued by FundX.
